case_title: DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. YOUNG ELECTRIC SIGN COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG ELECTRIC SIGN COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG ELECTRIC SIGN COMPANY $3,550.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,550.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
